form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 12 over 435m at this track behind Pretty Follie beaten 2 lengths (24.76). Missed the frame last time but prior to that had two placings in a row. Deserves another chance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 510m in 28.83 last start, beating Dr. Fanatical. Has a slick 24.42 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished 5th on April 16 over 515m at Sandown behind Illuminator beaten 15 lengths (30.49) in a Grade 5. Leading chance on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and fell approaching first turn.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time at this track but prior to that had been racing consistently, notching five minors in a row. Has a squeeze box to navigate and will need to find best.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Warragul over 400m. Will need to improve to feature.

form.formComment: Has finished in the money at his last three runs, the latest at long odds when second (25.11) at this track. Drawn wide. Solid top-three prospects.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Warragul (26.28) in a Restricted WIN H, finishing a 6 length sixth. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed five times. Looks suited and should go close.
